mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.execute_type, t0.is_stock, t0.litigation_id, t0.project_id, t0.law_firm_id, t0.execute_code, t0.execute_court, t0.apply_execute_date, t0.executer, t0.executer_telphone, t0.execute_ruling_issuance_time, t0.remarks, t0.flow_state, t0.is_deleted
